store.name: Wind & Wire Field Supply
store.tagline: Field recording kits for musicians collecting sound outdoors

products.name: First Field Recorder Bag
products.description: A first portable recording bag with recorder protection, foam and furry wind control, coiled cable, memory-card case, rechargeable batteries, field notebook, and gain-setting cheat card.

products.name: Urban Texture Kit
products.description: Compact setup for train platforms, alleys, and street percussion with stereo capture, handling control, right-angle adapters, cable ties, labels, and slate cards.

products.name: Nature Ambience Kit
products.description: Long-form dawn ambience kit with layered wind protection, small stereo bar, tripod adapter, battery planning, memory case, notebook, and sample archive sleeves.

products.name: Contact-Mic Discovery Kit
products.description: Contact microphones, labeled cable ties, boundary helper, washable location labels, and a surface-focused logging format for found-percussion sessions.

products.name: Rainy-Day Capture Bundle
products.description: Weather pouch, soft recorder wrap, foam screens, boundary mic support, memory case, and archive sleeves for rainy-window texture and weathered close detail.

products.name: Pocket Pair Stereo Bar
products.description: Small stereo bar with tripod adapter and cable tie points for repeatable spacing in a portable field bag.

products.name: Harbor Hydrophone Lead
products.description: Hydrophone with labeled sleeve, coiled cable, and quick rinse card for harbor movement, creek beds, dock slap, and submerged texture.

products.name: Soft Recorder Wrap
products.description: Quiet wrap for handheld recorders that reduces bag scrape and finger noise during moving takes.

products.name: Layered Fur Windshield Set
products.description: Foam and furry windshield layers for compact mics and handheld recorders used in low wind, dawn ambience, and travel-light sessions.

products.name: Cable Discipline Pack
products.description: Coiled cables, right-angle adapters, labeled cable ties, and washable location labels for fast setup and fewer lost takes.

products.name: Power & Memory Pocket
products.description: Rechargeable battery set, small power bank, memory-card case, and session checklist for longer outdoor capture days.

products.name: Take Log & Slate Set
products.description: Field notebook, slate cards, washable location labels, gain-setting cheat cards, and sample archive sleeves for organized sample collection.

products.name: Closed-Back Monitoring Kit
products.description: Closed-back monitoring headphones and quick gain notes for checking wind, handling noise, and usable signal before leaving a location.

products.name: Subway Rhythm Pack
products.description: Right-angle adapters, compact stereo mic support, shock mount, cable ties, and slate cards for train platforms and metallic rhythmic transitions.

products.name: Travel-Light Carry-On Pack
products.description: Compact recorder wrap, windscreen set, lavalier pair support, power bank, memory case, and cable labels for lighter travel recording.
